'''vajama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kachakbar|kachakbar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-j-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kachakbar|kachakbar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vajama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væjæmæth|væjæmæth]] || [[word:væjæmæj|væjæmæj]] || [[word:væjæmæsh|væjæmæsh]] || [[word:væjæmæ|væjæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vajajamath|vajajamath]] || [[word:vajajamaj|vajajamaj]] || [[word:vajajamash|vajajamash]] || [[word:vajajama|vajajama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vajamath|vajamath]] || [[word:vajamaj|vajamaj]] || [[word:vajamash|vajamash]] || [[word:vajama|vajama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vajafmath|vajafmath]] || [[word:vajafmaj|vajafmaj]] || [[word:vajafmash|vajafmash]] || [[word:vajafmaf|vajafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vajamatha|vajamatha]] || [[word:vajamaja|vajamaja]] || [[word:vajamasha|vajamasha]] || [[word:vajamaka|vajamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vajamath|vajamath]] || [[word:vajamaj|vajamaj]] || [[word:vajamash|vajamash]] || [[word:vajama|vajama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vajamathal|vajamathal]] || [[word:vajamajal|vajamajal]] || [[word:vajamashal|vajamashal]] || [[word:vajamakal|vajamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vajamathatha|vajamathatha]] || [[word:vajamajaja|vajamajaja]] || [[word:vajamashasha|vajamashasha]] || [[word:vajamaka|vajamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vajamathan|vajamathan]] || [[word:vajamajan|vajamajan]] || [[word:vajamashan|vajamashan]] || [[word:vajamakan|vajamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vajamathaoro|vajamathaoro]] || [[word:vajamajaoro|vajamajaoro]] || [[word:vajamashaoro|vajamashaoro]] || [[word:vajamakaoro|vajamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
